description: Enterprise-style OTEL logs dashboard with reliability and business insights

panels.description: Total ingested app log lines per second
panels.title: Log Throughput

panels.description: Errors as % of all logs over last 5m
panels.title: Error Ratio (5m)

panels.description: Focused view for synthetic failures and error lines
panels.title: Error Log Stream

panels.description: Successful checkouts as percentage of all checkout events

targets.expr: (100 * (sum(rate({service_name=~"$service"} |= "event=checkout" |= "status=SUCCESS" | logfmt | tenant=~"$tenant" [5m])) / sum(rate({service_name=~"$service"} |= "event=checkout" | logfmt | tenant=~"$tenant" [5m])))) or vector(0)

panels.title: Checkout Success Ratio (5m)

panels.description: Estimated checkout revenue per minute from SUCCESS events

targets.expr: (sum(rate({service_name=~"$service"} |= "event=checkout" | logfmt | tenant=~"$tenant" | status="SUCCESS" | unwrap amount | __error__="" [1m])) * 60) or vector(0)

panels.title: Checkout Revenue / min

targets.expr: max(quantile_over_time(0.95, {service_name=~"$service"} |= "event=checkout" | logfmt | tenant=~"$tenant" | unwrap latency_ms | __error__="" [5m])) or vector(0)

panels.description: Total checkout attempts in the last 5 minutes
panels.title: Checkout Volume (5m)

targets.expr: sum by (region) (rate({service_name=~"$service"} |= "event=checkout" |= "status=FAILED" | logfmt | tenant=~"$tenant" [5m])) or vector(0)

panels.description: Focused business stream for checkout events
panels.title: Checkout Event Stream

title: OTEL Logs Dashboard
